---
title: "CV"
---

# Mohammed Mudarris

PhD Candidate — Health, and Medical, Neuropsychology  
Institute of Psychology, Leiden University  

---

## Education

**PhD in Psychology**, Leiden University — Leiden, Netherlands  
Jun 2021 – May 2026  

- Thesis: *Multisensory stimulation to promote cognitive and motor recovery*  
- Research topics: motor cognition, multimodal MRI, hierarchical modelling, cognitive–motor interference, aging and stroke

**MSc in Clinical Neuropsychology**, Leiden University  
*cum laude*
Feb 2018 – May 2019  

- Thesis: *Predictors of sensorimotor synchronization in a finger tapping task*

**BS in Biopsychology**, University of California, Santa Barbara — CA, USA  
Aug 2011 – Sep 2015  

- Capstone: *Naturally occurring and administered gonadal hormones predict sexual consummatory behaviors: Sex differences in c-Fos activation in hypothalamic nuclei of adult rats*

---

## Teaching & Research Experience

**Leiden University — Netherlands**

*Education and Research Staff*  
Apr 2024 – Apr 2025  

- Supervised 7 MSc theses and 11 internship students  
- Instructor, MSc *Neurocognition* workgroup

*Lecturer*  
Sep 2023 – Jul 2024  

- Neurocognition (MSc)  
- Clinical Neuropsychology  
- Perspectives on Career Planning (BSc)

---

**University of Jeddah — Saudi Arabia**

*Lecturer*  
Jan 2021 – May 2021  

*Teaching Assistant*  
Aug 2019 – Jan 2021  

---

**Dar Al-Hekma University — Jeddah, Saudi Arabia**

*Guest Lecturer*  
Nov – Dec 2016  

Courses taught:
- General Psychology  
- Social Psychology  
- Human Development

---

**University of California, Santa Barbara — CA, USA**

*Undergraduate Researcher*  
Mar – Jun 2015  

- Family Health Project (Advisor: Daphne Bugental, PhD)  
- Behavioral Endocrinology Lab (Advisor: Tod Kippin, PhD)

*Research Assistant*  
Jun – Dec 2014  

- Life History Project (Advisor: Aaron Blackwell, PhD)  
- Free Scotoma Project (Advisor: Miguel Eckstein, PhD)

---

## Clinical and Professional Experience

**King Faisal Specialist Hospital & Research Center — Riyadh, Saudi Arabia**

*Clinical Neuropsychology Intern*  
Jan – Aug 2019  

Supervisor: Haya Al-Joudi, PsyD  

- Neuropsychological assessment of 45 neurosurgical candidates  
- Wada evaluations and cortical brain mapping  
- Cognitive rehabilitation for epilepsy, Parkinson’s disease, and neurodevelopmental disorders

---

**Adult & Child Therapy Center — Jeddah, Saudi Arabia**

*Senior Administrative Officer* 
May 2016 – Jan 2018  

- Managed administrative team of 12 staff  
- Implemented scheduling system for 10 clinics and 21 clinicians

*Psychologist Assistant*  
May – Jun 2016  

Supervisor: Samraa Sulaiman, MD  

- Psychological assessments for mood/anxiety disorders and ADHD  
- School and clinic assessments for neurodevelopmental disorders

---

## Academic Service

**Science Committee Member**  
International Neuropsychological Society  
Feb 2022 – Feb 2025  

**Co-organizer**  
MRI Methods Meetings — Leiden Institute for Brain and Cognition  
Sep 2021 – Sep 2025  

**Journal Reviewer**

- *Brain Sciences*  
- *European Journal of Neuroscience*  
- *Behavioral and Brain Functions*  
- *Experimental Brain Research*

**Public Outreach**

- *Over de Kop* — Brain Science Festival (2023)  
- EEG Demonstration — LIBC Publieksdag (2018)  
- Basalt Rehabilitation Information Market — *Dag van de beroerte* (2024)  
- Transmuralis Network Zuid-Holland — *De reis van de CVA patiënt* (2024)

---

## Technical Skills

**Statistical Analysis**

- R  
- SPSS  
- JASP  

**Neuroimaging and Experimental Tools**

- FSL  
- FreeSurfer  
- E-Prime  
- Qualtrics  

**Programming and Systems**

- Linux  
- Bash  
- Python  
- MATLAB  

---

## Certifications

- Registered Clinical Neuropsychology Specialist — Saudi Commission for Health Specialties
- MRI License Holder — Leiden Institute for Brain & Cognition
- Basic Course for Clinical Inverstigators — Groningen University Medical Centre

---

## Languages

Arabic — Native  
English — Proficient  
Dutch — B1
